# OreCalc

> High-performance static Clash of Clans equipment ore calculator and planner.

This is a client-side web application to calculate exact Clash of Clans ore resources (Shiny, Glowy, Starry) required for equipment upgrades, map upgrades on a calendar, and calculate monthly/bimonthly income sources.

## Technology Stack
- **Core**: HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript (ES6 modules).
- **Service Worker / PWA**: Workbox-based service worker for offline capability.
- **Build System**: Custom Node.js build pipeline (`scripts/build.js`).
- **Localization**: Custom client-side translations supporting English and German.

## Architecture & Codebase Structure
- [index.html](index.html): Main layout compiled from components in `partials/`.
- [js/app.js](js/app.js): Application entry point and state coordination.
- [js/core/](js/core/): Core state, rendering, calculation, local storage, and schema migrations.
- [js/components/](js/components/): Modular UI components (planner, equipment, income).
- [js/incomeCalculations/](js/incomeCalculations/): Income modules (Clan War, CWL, Star Bonus, Event Pass, etc.).
- [js/dom/](js/dom/): DOM selectors mapping.
- [js/utils/](js/utils/): Validations, popovers, formatters, and date functions.
- [css/](css/): Sass stylesheet compiled to CSS.
